prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约11858→15439→20057→25721→20009，整体呈后移趋势，2024年达到峰值25721后2025年大幅回升至20009，近2年波动约5700名，2025 年基准约20009名；本省物理类计划2021–2025年分别为72、73、73、82、82人，2025年与2024年持平；2026年计划82人，与2025年持平，无扩缩招变化， 竞争压力主要来自考生规模。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2026年第57名，较2025年第62名上升5位，排名持续提升，学校综合实力和认可度有所增强；法学 A、应用经济学A-，均为该校王牌学科，法学类（物理类）2025年最低位次约9012名，应用经济学相关专业（金融学类、财政学类等）位次在12592–14636名区间，对高分考生有较 强吸引力；2025年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面（涉及师德师风事件），但影响范围有限；抖音热度总排名第73位，评价为一般，未出现高热关注或明显报考信号。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 财经/法学类专业社会热度整体平稳，未出现明显升温或降温；本省2026年普通高考总人数约609800人，较2025年（606754人）增加约3000人 ，物理类估算约364843人（较2025年增约1803人），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；学校位于湖北武汉，属中部地区，对河北考 生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在河北招生规模较大（物理类82人），属省外重点生源省份，招生占比稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回升的走势、2026年招生计划持平 、软科排名上升（第57名）带来的正面信号、本省物理类考生增加约1803人带来的竞争加剧，以及声誉偏负面但影响有限的综合判断，预计2026年物理类最低位次在20009名基础 上小幅上移；预测最低位次约20039名，区间19539–20539名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 11858 → 15439 → 20057 → 25721 → 20009, showing an overall backward trend. In 2024, it peaked at 25721, then rebounded significantly to 20009 in 2025, with a fluctuation of about 5700 places in the last two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 20009. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 72, 73, 73, 82, and 82 students respectively. In 2025, it remained the same as 2024. The 2026 plan is 82 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction. Competitive pressure mainly comes from the scale of examinees.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, up 5 places from 62nd in 2025, with continuous improvement in ranking, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. Law is rated A, Applied Economics A-, both are flagship disciplines. For Law (Physics Category), the minimum ranking in 2025 was about 9012. For Applied Economics-related majors (Finance, Public Finance, etc.), rankings ranged from 12592 to 14636, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (involving teacher ethics incidents), but the impact was limited. Douyin popularity ranked 73rd overall, rated as average, with no high attention or obvious application signals.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of finance/law majors is generally stable, with no significant warming or cooling. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination takers in the province is about 609,800, an increase of about 3,000 from 2025 (606,754). The estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 364,843 (an increase of about 1,803 from 2025), with the expansion of examinee scale intensifying competition. The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, with some cross-provincial appeal to Hebei candidates. The university has a large enrollment scale in Hebei (82 students in Physics Category), making it a key source province outside the province, with a stable enrollment proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the significant rebound in rankings in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the positive signal from the rise in Soft Science ranking (57th), the intensified competition due to an increase of about 1,803 Physics Category examinees in the province, and the limited impact of negative reputation, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly increase from the baseline of 20009. The predicted minimum ranking is about 20039, with a range of 19539–20539.

Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 (Public Finance, Economics, Statistics, etc., Applied Economics A- disciplines), sprint for Tier 1 (Law, Accounting, Computer), and use Tier 3 as safety (Finance, Business Administration). Candidates significantly above the upper limit (<19539) can focus on sprinting for flagship majors like Law and Accounting; candidates near the lower limit (about 20539) should mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering lower-ranking Tier 2 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1731 → 2028 → 2721 → 2882 → 2181, showing an overall backward trend. It peaked at 2882 in 2024 and then rebounded significantly to 2181 in 2025, with a fluctuation of about 700 places in the last two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 2181. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category from 2021 to 2025 was 56, 57, 57, 49, and 46 students respectively, showing a gradual reduction trend. The 2026 plan is 48 students, an increase of 2 students (+4.3%) compared to 2025, indicating a slight expansion and a slight easing of competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university. Ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, up 5 places from 62nd in 2025, with continuous improvement in ranking, enhancing the university's overall strength and recognition. During the 2025 college entrance examination period, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (involving teacher ethics incidents), but the impact was limited. Douyin popularity ranked 73rd overall, rated as average, without high attention or obvious application signals. Law is rated A, Applied Economics is rated A-, both are the university's flagship disciplines. In 2025, the minimum ranking for Law (History Category) was approximately 876, and for Applied Economics-related majors (Finance, Fiscal Studies, etc.), the rankings ranged from 1349 to 1789, strongly attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, with some cross-provincial appeal to Hebei students. Its enrollment scale in Hebei for History Category is about 48 students, making it a key province for out-of-province enrollment. The social popularity of finance/law majors is generally stable, with law remaining relatively hot as one of the Five Institutes and Four Departments. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in the province is approximately 609,800, an increase of about 3,000 from 2025 (606,754). The estimated number of History Category students is about 244,957 (an increase of about 1,243 from 2025), with the expanded candidate pool intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant rebound in 2025 rankings, the slight expansion of 2 students (+4.3%) in 2026, the positive signal from the Soft Science ranking increase (57th), the intensified competition due to an increase of about 1,243 History Category candidates in the province, and the limited impact of the negative reputation, the easing effect of expansion and the competition effect of increased candidates roughly offset each other. It is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly rise from the 2181 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2253, with a range of 1847 to 2659.

For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 (Fiscal Studies Category, Economics, Finance Category, etc., which are Applied Economics A- disciplines), with Tier 1 as a stretch (Law Category, Accounting), and Tier 3 as a safety (Business Administration Category, Journalism and Communication Category). For rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<1847), focus on top-tier majors like Law Double Degree and Law Category. For rankings near the lower limit (approximately 2659), prioritize Tier 3 majors, while also considering lower-ranked Tier 2 majors.
